sections.voice_notes: primary_heading: verbatim atom 94df26ac used exactly, lowercase preserved as written. body: verbatim atom 2528ca66 used exactly, casing preserved. No buttons added; the hero stays quiet per the anti-pattern note (no saccharine kid-ministry enthusiasm). Tender, not loud.

copy.primary_heading: before you were even born, god loved you first
copy.body: BEGINNING WITH A STRONG SENSE OF BELONGING

sections.voice_notes: primary_heading: tonal anchor from voice_rule atom be43f59d ('delight shows up in the details') without quoting the rule; plain label, no sell. body: verbatim atom 73a9658c used exactly. items[0]: stories + songs, rhythm of the room, expanded from the atom's claim that kids grow up sensing God's love. items[1]: play + belonging, concrete nouns (blocks, crayons, floor time), no performed warmth. items[2]: Parents Room with 'somewhere to breathe' framing, permission-giving rather than security-theater.

copy.body: We want all of our kids to grow up with a sense that God's love is generous, inclusive, and affirming of all human beings.

items.item_body: Every Saturday starts with a story from scripture and songs little voices can carry. The rhythm stays the same week to week, so even the youngest kids know what comes next.
Blocks, crayons, and floor time with teachers who know your kid by name. Belonging starts here, before any of it has words.
A quiet room off the gathering space with somewhere to sit, feed a baby, or settle a fussy one. If you need a minute to breathe, take it. Nobody is counting.

sections.voice_notes: Fact values woven directly per outline unresolved_inputs (facts 631e87bd, e3a0634e, 1ac6eab1 are not atoms): Saturdays 9:15 AM, ages 0 to 4, 51 W Olive Redlands, Donna Hadley / Teacher Donna, info@paradoxredlands.com. primary_heading: logistics as a label echoing the 'Saturday evenings in Redlands' exemplar cadence. items keep time/age/coordinator scannable per the anti-pattern note; nothing buried in prose. Tone anchored by the be43f59d voice rule: delight in details, no forced enthusiasm.

copy.body: ParaTots meets Saturdays at 9:15 AM at 51 W Olive in Redlands, for kids ages 0 to 4. Teacher Donna coordinates the room each week. The whole gathering follows at 10:00, so drop-off and pick-up stay simple.

items.item_body: Saturdays at 9:15 AM at 51 W Olive, Redlands. Check-in is inside the lobby, and a teacher will walk you and your kid to the room.
Donna Hadley, a founding member of Paradox and Pastor Craig's mother, coordinates ParaTots. Questions before you come? Write her at info@paradoxredlands.com.

sections.voice_notes: primary_heading: per drafter_hint, the 9:15 then 10:00 pairing as a label (commas, no terminal punctuation, so it stays a label rather than a sentence). body: two sentences, facts from 631e87bd woven directly. One clear action, no urgency language per the anti-pattern note. CTA label is verb-led. Avoided the 'Come as you are' anchor phrase verbatim since it sits on the church-cliche ban list; kept its posture instead.

copy.body: ParaTots starts Saturdays at 9:15. At 10:00 the whole church gathers at 51 W Olive, kids and parents in the same room.

sections.voice_notes: primary_heading: lifts 'generous, inclusive, affirming' directly from atom 73a9658c; the triad is the church's own intentional language, not interchangeable filler. body: quiet solidarity, no village cliches, no moralizing; echoes the voice exemplar 'Kids are loud in the lobby and welcome to be.' verbatim. CTA: 'Email Teacher Donna' with mailto from fact 1ac6eab1, woven directly per unresolved_inputs.

copy.body: Raising kids under five is a mystery, and nobody here pretends otherwise. Kids are loud in the lobby and welcome to be. If you have questions about any of it, Teacher Donna reads every email.

deviation_note: Repair pass: removed the 'voice_notes_by_slot' key from every section's copy object (it is not a declared slot on any archetype); per-slot drafter notes now live in each section's voice_notes string. No copy text changed. As flagged in the outline's unresolved_inputs, fact values (Saturdays 9:15 AM, ages 0-4, 51 W Olive Redlands, Donna Hadley / Teacher Donna, info@paradoxredlands.com) are woven directly into sections 2, 3, and 4 rather than referenced as atoms. The 'Come as you are' voice anchor for section 3 was honored in posture but not quoted verbatim because the phrase appears on the mechanical church-cliche ban list.

Outline section 2 voice anchor says 'Saturday evenings' but the service_time fact says 9:15 AM; drafted to the fact (9:15 AM). Strategist should confirm.
